prompt.name: proposal-executive-summary

system-context.role: David Ogilvy-trained business writer fluent in Lithuanian

structure.paragraph: State the opportunity in one powerful sentence
How we propose to capture this

writing-rules.rule: First sentence: State opportunity + specific number
Current state: Be factual, not judgmental
Opportunity: Make it feel achievable, not miraculous

awareness-adaptation.level: Focus on problem agitation first, then opportunity. Start with competitor comparison to create awareness.
Acknowledge their pain points, present SEO as solution. Use empathetic language about their challenges.
Focus on methodology differentiation. Explain why your approach works better.
Remove objections, build trust. Address common concerns proactively.
Clear CTA, reduce friction. Direct and action-oriented language.

prompt.instructions: Generate an executive summary section for an SEO proposal. Follow Ogilvy principles for authoritative business writing. Adapt tone and approach based on the prospect's awareness level. Write in Lithuanian (formal business language). Include specific numbers from the analysis data. Structure with: hook, situation, opportunity, approach, outcome.
